title: ModuleRestartRequest
description: Request to restart a module with a new binary

module_name.description: Name of the module to restart

new_binary_path.description: Path to the new binary to use

old_binary_path.description: Path to the old binary (for rollback)

restart_mode.description: Restart mode: graceful (finish current job) or immediate

requested_by.description: Identifier of who requested the restart
